subject: xinmotek fix (#11)
author: Alan Steremberg

impact.effect_if_absent: No effect — device support is already in stock 5.15.1 via upstream commit c62f7cd8ed06; this commit duplicates an existing quirk entry.

notes: CRITICAL FINDING: This commit adds an exact duplicate HID quirk entry for USB_VENDOR_ID_XIN_MO / USB_DEVICE_ID_XIN_MO_DUAL_ARCADE. The device was already present in stock 5.15.1 at line 194, introduced by upstream commit c62f7cd8ed06 (2019-12-01). The duplicate causes no functional harm (HID subsystem handles duplicates safely) but is a no-op. The device remains supported in vanilla 6.18 at line 219 with identical quirk flags. Revert commit ec75e65f correctly removed this duplicate 1.5 years later. Not carried in our build; device support is purely upstream. Main_MiSTer references VID 0x16c0 but for the Sinden Lightgun (PIDs 0x0f01/0x0f02/0x0f38/0x0f39), not the XIN_MO arcade stick (PID 0x05e1).
